description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the openjdk Docker image, defining a cache keyed by $CI_BUILD_REF_NAME that stores all files under .gradle/* and enables untracked files, and set the GRADLE_USER_HOME variable to .gradle. Define two stages: build and test. In the build stage add a compile-billing job that runs ./gradlew beer-billing:clean beer-billing:compileJava -x check --no-daemon, and a compile-waiter job that runs ./gradlew beer-waiter:clean beer-waiter:compileJava -x check --no-daemon. In the test stage add a test-billing job that runs ./gradlew beer-billing:test --no-daemon.
